claim: No Stable, APG interoperability-complete, large-data performance, release, package-parity, or recorded manual assistive-technology claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: A named role=treegrid contains owned column headers, hierarchical rows, and roving gridcells with real row, column, level, set, expansion, selection, disabled, busy, and read-only state.
semantics.focusModel: One gridcell is tabbable; focus and selection remain distinct across expansion, editing, and bounded virtualization.

keyboard.behavior: Enters or exits through the one active gridcell; editors add native internal stops only while active.
Moves to the same logical column in the previous or next visible row.
Follows inherited direction; at the hierarchy cell it expands, collapses, or reaches parent/child, and otherwise moves between cells.
Moves to the first or last cell in the row; Ctrl moves to the first or last cell in the grid.
Moves one bounded visible page or ten rows while preserving the logical column.
Toggles row selection only when a selection mode is active.
Expands sibling branches, selects all eligible visible rows in multiple mode, or performs wraparound row-label typeahead.
Starts editing only for an editable column with an onEditCommit callback.
Saves or cancels and restores the originating gridcell focus.

enhancementIsolation.summaryFalse: No summary output, aria-describedby relationship, count work, or accessibility node exists.
enhancementIsolation.announcementsFalse: No live region or announcement update exists.
enhancementIsolation.editingOmitted: F2 is not prevented; no editor, buttons, pending state, error, or edit callback exists.
enhancementIsolation.virtualFalse: Every visible hierarchical row renders; no spacers or window callback exists.

preferences.forcedColors: Grid structure, selected/active states, editors, errors, controls, and focus map to system colors.
preferences.reducedMotion: Focus recovery scrolls with behavior auto and no meaning depends on motion.
preferences.rtl: Logical indentation and horizontal tree/cell navigation mirror from inherited direction.

limitations: Source-present-unreleased evidence does not yet include generated parity, packed consumers, large-data performance, APG assistive-technology interoperability, or manual sessions.
Consumers own data loading, durable edits, authorization, virtual-window policy, and narrow non-tabular detail alternatives.
